title: ScenePromptPacket
description: One compiled scene as emitted by the longcat storyboard compiler (S2-1) and accepted by the longcat render pipeline. Matches the CompiledScene dataclass in compile_storyboard.py.

prompt.description: Compiled conditioning prompt for this scene only. Anchors + beat, trimmed to PROMPT_BUDGET_CHARS.

per_scene_generated_seconds.description: Fresh frames this scene contributes (excludes overlap).

overlap_frames.description: Latent-tail frames carried from the previous scene. 0 for scene[0].
